2148510.name: Droid Death VR
2148510.description:
Droid Death VR is a Multiplayer Shooter in Virtual Reality set in a sci fi universe where maps are designed around specific planets to have fun shooting your friends and other players.

Demo Coming Soon

Features

Basics

Quick match making
Shooter combat
VR
Steam friends Join option
Power ups

Game match types

4v4 Team Deathmatch
Dunk the ball match
Battle royal match

Weapon Types

Pistol
Blaster
Wave Blaster
Rifle
Shotgun
Sniper
Grenade launcher
Rocket launcher
Gatling Blaster
2148510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
